backend.changelog: Co-release with CadBridge 1.8.87 - clearer status while SolidWorks is still launching (it is no longer mislabeled 'Wrong tenant' when the tenant is actually correct).

cadBridge.changelog: The CadBridge installer now reliably installs the gateway security certificate on servers that already run other web services on port 80 (such as IIS): it fetches the CA over the gateway HTTPS address and alternative HTTP ports, with a TLS 1.2 fallback.
